hero.headline: We Transform Your Business Digital Presence
hero.subheadline: We specialize in web development and digital redesign for businesses in the Mexican Caribbean. We take your brand to the next level with modern, professional solutions.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive digital solutions to boost your business in local and international markets.

items.title: Web Development
items.description: Custom-built websites with cutting-edge technology. From landing pages to complex platforms with booking systems, online payments, and admin dashboards.

items.title: Digital Redesign
items.description: We completely renovate your company's digital image. We modernize your website, optimize user experience, and improve your online positioning.

items.title: Branding & Identity
items.description: We create a visual identity that reflects your brand's essence. Logo design, color palettes, typography, and complete style guides.

items.title: SEO & Digital Marketing
items.description: We position your business at the top of search results. Content strategies, technical optimization, and campaigns that deliver measurable results.

portfolio.title: Our Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Real projects that demonstrate our expertise across diverse industries in the Mexican Caribbean.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your digital partner in the Mexican Caribbean
about.mission: At Caribbean Digital Lab, our mission is to transform the digital presence of businesses in the Mexican Caribbean, connecting them with local and international customers through exceptional web experiences.
about.story: We were born with the vision of elevating the region's digital standard. With proven experience across multiple industries — from tourism and hospitality to healthcare and legal services — we understand the unique needs of the Caribbean market and know how to position your business to compete globally.
differentiators: Proven experience in the Mexican Caribbean market
Bilingual team ready for international clients
Modern technology ensuring performance and security

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Ready to transform your digital presence? Write to us and we'll respond within 24 hours.

form.name: Full name
form.success: Message sent successfully! We'll contact you soon.
form.error: We couldn't send your message. Please try again or contact us via WhatsApp.

footer.tagline: Transforming the Mexican Caribbean, one website at a time.
